issues.sample: At 20,000 miles I notice a popping coming from the right front wheel area at low speeds or turning to park.   2 dealerships told me nothing was wrong.  At 45, 650 I insisted the dealership fix the problem as it was now on both sides of the front wheel area.  Top hats and motor mo

narrative.headline: What 2020 Subaru Brz owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Suspension (50% of reports).
